meta.toolResultPreview: 1: # 🚀 Pablo IB - Tech Blog & Second Brain 2: 3: ## 🏗️ Project Stack 4: - **SSG**: [Hugo v0.159.0+](https://gohugo.io/) 5: - **Theme**: Custom Layouts (based on [Paper](https://github.com/nanxiaobei/hugo-paper)) 6: - **Tech**: Go Templates, HTML/CSS (Vanilla + Tailwind-like utilities), Markdown. 7: 8: ## 🛠️ Workflow Commands 9: - **Dev Server**: `hugo server --buildDrafts` 10: - **Build**: `hugo --minify` 11: - **New Post**: `hugo new posts/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md` 12: - **Deploy**: Manual `git push` (GitHub Pages handles the build via Actions). 13: 14: ## 📝 Code Conventions 15: - **SEO First**: Every post must have frontmatter with `title`, `date`, `categories`, `tags`, and `readingTime`. 16…
